scope.target: Synchronize approved repository rules across active AI context, prompts, guides, tests, and examples
scope.dependency_radius: Future agent generation, review, test, profile, and onboarding behavior
constraints: Keep .NET-only rules out of universal shared context
Do not make examples the source of truth
non_goals: No broad translation migration unless D9 approves it

review_findings: At least 24 documentation/context files use the legacy repository name
Prompts, tests, profiles, and examples inherit conflicting contracts

steps: Classify affected files by audience and ownership
Update active agent context and prompt references
validation: No active dependent document overrides the canonical standards
Runtime wrappers contain pointers rather than duplicated rules
Repository naming and method searches match the approved contract
